definitions: People who babysit or look after children.
People who pose for an artist or photographer.
People who are present at a meeting or event.
People who are employed to look after a house or pets while the owner is away.
examples: The sitters arrived promptly at 7 PM.
The artist had several sitters for her new portrait series.
There were many sitters in the audience for the lecture.
House sitters are often responsible for watering plants.
